fact.fact: Generated AI Agent assignment excludes team_id, teamId, OpenAPI task-context paths, Open API keys, and X-Workspace-Api-Key from client, agent, daemon, deployment, and smoke-test boundaries

source_refs.required_phrase: generated assignment requests carry agent_id only

downstreams.local_scope: private task context may resolve task location from task_id internally, but generated client requests and deployment/smoke criteria do not require team_id, OpenAPI keys, or Open API keys
calls generated assignment with agent_id in the body and route-supplied task/workspace ids only
polls and executes assignment snapshots without receiving team_id or OpenAPI workspace keys
does not treat team_id/OpenAPI/Open API task-context key configuration as generated-assignment deployment evidence
